policy_note: Default policy is 90% line coverage per source file. The per-file entries below are debt baselines locked at floor(current measured %) - 1 so any regression fails the check and any test addition immediately ratchets the floor up. Goal: every file at >=90%, no debt baselines. Session 1 (2026-05-16): TOTAL 92.87%, 32/34 files at >=90%, 2 debt baselines. Cleared: detect/config_io.rs (49% -> 98%, the helpers were actually exercised — earlier 49% was stale), architectures/gemma3.rs (86% -> ~100% via direct tests), architectures/gemma4.rs (84% -> >=90% via dense-vs-MoE getter coverage), quant/ggml/q4_k.rs (85% -> >=90% via error-path + scalar-reference tests), quant/mxfp4.rs (86% -> >=90% via overflow-path tests). Remaining: loading/gguf.rs is the big one — needs binary-fixture coverage of the less-common metadata variants and tensor-type branches; loading/safetensors.rs is right at the bar.
